text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables machines to understand and interpret visual information from the world. One of its main tasks is image recognition, where a computer identifies what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Another important task is object detection, which goes further by locating objects within an image. Computer vision has many practical applications. For example, it is used in self-driving cars to detect other vehicles, pedestrians, and traffic signs. This helps cars make safe decisions on the road. Other applications include facial recognition and medical image analysis.
